basic_details.job_title: FACT Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore (FACT) has released the FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Recruitment 2026 Notification for 1 vacancy of Assistant Manager (Welfare) under Advt No. 06/2026. This recruitment offers an excellent opportunity for candidates holding a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Social Work, Human Resources Management, or Labour Welfare to join a leading public sector undertaking. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official FACT website before 05 August 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years (as on 01.07.2026) Age Relaxation: Maximum age limit for PwBD is 10 years, and for Ex-Servicemen, it is the period of service to be deducted, with the resultant age not exceeding the maximum age limit by more than 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Social Work or Human Resources Management or Labour Welfare
qualification.details: 2 year Post Graduate Degree in Social Work or Human Resources Management or Labour Welfare from any institution recognised by the Central or State Government OR 2 year Post Graduate Diploma in Social Work or Human Resources Management or Labour Welfare from any institution recognised by the Central or State Government. Working knowledge (speaking, reading and writing) in Malayalam language in addition to English. Minimum 3 years post qualification executive experience (managerial cadre) in Labour Welfare and Industrial Relations in a PSU/Factory/Mines/Plantations having a workforce of minimum 250 employees.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Rs.50000-160000 (E2) Selected candidates will be appointed on probation for a period of six months with Basic Pay at the minimum in managerial scale of pay of Rs.50000-160000 (E2). Candidates will be eligible for IDA, EPF and other applicable allowances and perks like medical reimbursement/medical insurance coverage/ESI, township accommodation/HRA, subsidised meals/meal subsidy, uniform, accident insurance coverage, performance related pay etc. as per rules in force and as amended from time to time. Protection of pay to the extent of Basic pay + DA for candidates currently working on permanent rolls in Public Sector Firms, Institutes under the Government, will be considered.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FACT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the FACT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: 2 year Post Graduate Degree in Social Work or Human Resources Management or Labour Welfare from any institution recognised by the Central or State Government OR 2 year Post Graduate Diploma in Social Work or Human Resources Management or Labour Welfare from any institution recognised by the Central or State Government. Working knowledge (speaking, reading and writing) in Malayalam language in addition to English. Minimum 3 years post qualification executive experience (managerial cadre) in Labour Welfare and Industrial Relations in a PSU/Factory/Mines/Plantations having a workforce of minimum 250 employees.

content_sections.heading: FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years (as on 01.07.2026) Age Relaxation: Maximum age limit for PwBD is 10 years, and for Ex-Servicemen, it is the period of service to be deducted, with the resultant age not exceeding the maximum age limit by more than 3 years.

content_sections.heading: FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Pay Scale: Rs.50000-160000 (E2) Selected candidates will be appointed on probation for a period of six months with Basic Pay at the minimum in managerial scale of pay of Rs.50000-160000 (E2). Candidates will be eligible for IDA, EPF and other applicable allowances and perks like medical reimbursement/medical insurance coverage/ESI, township accommodation/HRA, subsidised meals/meal subsidy, uniform, accident insurance coverage, performance related pay etc. as per rules in force and as amended from time to time. Protection of pay to the extent of Basic pay + DA for candidates currently working on permanent rolls in Public Sector Firms, Institutes under the Government, will be considered.

Last date for receipt of Application by Post

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FACT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) recruitment is 05 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 2-year Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Social Work, Human Resources Management, or Labour Welfare from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) post is 35 years as of 01 July 2026, with applicable age relaxations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 (E2) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) post in FACT.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification executive experience in Labour Welfare and Industrial Relations is required.

faq.question: Q7. Do I need to know Malayalam to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, working knowledge of Malayalam (speaking, reading, and writing) is required in addition to English.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for the FACT Assistant Manager (Welfare) recruitment?
faq.answer: General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1180/- including GST, while SC/ST/PwBD candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Manager (Welfare) post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
